mapper.select: select sm.perms from sys_user_role sur inner join sys_role_menu srm on sur.role_id = srm.role_id inner join sys_menu sm on srm.menu_id = sm.id where sur.user_id = #{loginId} and sm.perms is not null
select sr.name from sys_user_role sur inner join sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.id where sur.user_id = #{loginId}
